ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* Unique URI identifier for the organisation */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Label or name of the organisation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organisation */,
  "organisation_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., government, private, non-profit) */,
  "registered_address" TEXT /* Registered address of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organization */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the organization's website */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the organization was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_uri")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference for the site */,
  "site_name_address" TEXT /* Name and address of the site */,
  "siteplan_url" TEXT /* URL to the site plan */,
  "coordinate_reference_system" TEXT /* Coordinate reference system used */,
  "geo_x" INTEGER /* Geographic X coordinate */,
  "geo_y" INTEGER /* Geographic Y coordinate */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Area of the site in hectares */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the site */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "zoning_classification" TEXT /* Zoning classification of the site */,
  "current_occupancy" TEXT /* Current occupancy status of the site (e.g., vacant, partially occupied) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Estimated property value of the site */,
  "environmental_assessment" TEXT /* Summary of environmental assessments */,
  "infrastructure_status" TEXT /* Status of existing infrastructure (e.g., utilities, roads) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_reference")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the planning application */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI identifier for the organisation */,
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference for the site */,
  "deliverable" TEXT /* Indicates if the application is deliverable */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Current status of the planning application */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of planning permission */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date when planning permission was granted */,
  "planning_history" TEXT /* History of planning applications for the site */,
  "proposed_for_pip" TEXT /* Indicates if proposed for Priority Infrastructure Project */,
  "min_net_dwellings" INTEGER /* Minimum number of net dwellings */,
  "development_description" TEXT /* Description of the proposed development */,
  "non_housing_development" TEXT /* Description of non-housing development aspects */,
  "part2" TEXT /* Part 2 of the planning application */,
  "net_dwellings_range_from" INTEGER /* Range of net dwellings from */,
  "net_dwellings_range_to" INTEGER /* Range of net dwellings to */,
  "hazardous_substances" TEXT /* Information on hazardous substances */,
  "site_information" TEXT /* Additional site information */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on the planning application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the planning application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the planning application was decided */,
  "decision_made_by" TEXT /* Name or role of the person who made the decision */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  "public_hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of any public hearing related to the application */,
  "public_hearing_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the public hearing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_applications_organisation_uri FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_uri") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_uri"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_applications_site_reference FOREIGN KEY ("site_reference") REFERENCES sites ("site_reference")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_details" (
  "development_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the development proposal */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "development_type" TEXT /* Type of development */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the development */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Projected start date of the development */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Projected end date of the development */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the development (e.g., planning, construction, completed) */,
  "progress_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of completion for the development */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the development details were last updated */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name or role of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("development_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_development_details_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the planning permission */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of planning permission granted */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date when planning permission was granted */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions attached to the permission */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of permission renewal (e.g., pending, renewed, not renewed) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was renewed */,
  "renewal_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions for permission renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the planning history event */,
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference for the site */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the planning history event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the planning history event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of planning history event (e.g., application submitted, permission granted) */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event information (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_history_site_reference FOREIGN KEY ("site_reference") REFERENCES sites ("site_reference"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_history_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the public engagement event */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the public engagement period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the public engagement period */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of public engagement */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the public engagement */,
  "engagement_method" TEXT /* Method of public engagement (e.g., online survey, public meeting) */,
  "number_of_responses" INTEGER /* Number of responses received */,
  "response_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the responses */,
  "public_concerns" TEXT /* Key concerns raised by the public */,
  "mitigation_measures" TEXT /* Measures proposed to address public concerns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_engagement_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the site characteristic */,
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference for the site */,
  "characteristic_type" TEXT /* Type of characteristic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the characteristic was assessed */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Summary of environmental impact assessments */,
  "cultural_heritage" TEXT /* Information about any cultural heritage on the site */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Historical significance of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_characteristics_site_reference FOREIGN KEY ("site_reference") REFERENCES sites ("site_reference")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_impacts" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the development impact */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the impact */,
  "mitigation_measures" TEXT /* Mitigation measures proposed */,
  "impact_area" TEXT /* Area affected by the impact (e.g., local community, environment) */,
  "impact_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the impact (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "impact_monitoring" TEXT /* Methods for monitoring the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_development_impacts_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the financial aspect */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "cost_component" TEXT /* Component of the cost */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount associated with the cost component */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of funding (e.g., secured, pending) */,
  "funding_source_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the funding source */,
  "funding_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions attached to the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stakeholder */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder */,
  "contact_details" TEXT /* Contact details for the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_type" TEXT /* Type of stakeholder (e.g., developer, community group) */,
  "stakeholder_interest" TEXT /* Interest or stake in the project */,
  "stakeholder_influence" TEXT /* Level of influence (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakeholders_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)
